calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-27-2018 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-03-2018 Set For Trial On Sep-17-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Appearance Of Defendant Archie P. Hall At Deposition And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-19-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GWENDOLYN COLEMAN's Motion To Compel Appearance Of Defendant Archie P. Hall At Deposition And For Sanctions.

PLAINTIFF GWENDOLYN COLEMANS'S, MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITION OF DEFENDANT ARCHIE P. HALL IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS A RIGHT TO TAKE THE DEPOSITION OF DEFENDANT ABSENT A SHOWING OF EXTRAORDINARY CIRCUMSTANCES. DEFENDANT HAS INDICATED A WILLINGNESS TO SUBMIT TO A DEPOSITION IN THE LATER PART OF AUGUST AND THE COURT WILL ORDER THAT DEFENDANT WILL APPEAR FOR HIS DEPOSITION NO LATER THAN AUGUST 30, 2018 AND MAY BE ACCOMPANIED BY HIS DOCTOR IF HE WISHES. THE COURT IS AWARE THAT PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT BY AUGUST 2, 2018 AND IF PLAINTIFF BELIEVES THAT HE NEED TO COMPLETE THE DEPOSITION BEFORE FILING HE CAN SEEK RELIEF AS APPROPRIATE. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC3.1312 AND SUBMIT IT TO COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM. PROPSED ORDER TO BE MAILED TO JUDGE PRO TEM PAUL RENNE AT RENNEPAR85@GMAIL.COM.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Atty Fees
Off Calendar Jun-15-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jacob J. Labarre (949-477-5050 x 1036) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Gwendolyn Coleman via CourtCall.
Richard E. Paris (415-456-0678) for Defendant/Moving party ARCHIE HALL via CourtCall.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. The matter is heard concurrently with the Motion to Expunge Lis Pendens. Hearing is held. Argued re: proceeds of sale, death, sale of property, and 100k disputed amount. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT ARCHIE HALL Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Attorney's Fees is granted. Moving party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b) Attorney's fees amount to be left blank. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

Motion For Judgmnt On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jun-15-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jacob J. Labarre (949-477-5050 x 1036) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Gwendolyn Coleman via CourtCall.
Richard E. Paris (415-456-0678) for Defendant/Moving party ARCHIE HALL via CourtCall.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. The matter is heard concurrently with the Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings. Hearing is held. Argued re: proceeds of sale, death, sale of property, and 100k disputed amount. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT ARCHIE HALL Motion For Judgmnt On The Pleadings is GRANTED with leave to amend to state sufficient facts to show a binding agreement. Moving party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2017 Set For Trial On Sep-04-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jan-03-2018 Off Calendar
